page_content:
Program Learning Outcomes

1. Students will demonstrate understanding of the three pillars of our criminal justice system - courts, policing, and corrections

2. Students will demonstrate competency in understanding how criminal justice intersects with a variety of disciplines and career paths

3. Students will demonstrate an understanding of pressing challenges experienced by our criminal justice system

4. Students will demonstrate competency in their ability to read, interpret, and synthesize (in writing and/or orally) important research related to the criminal justice system
